_notes: flatGRPO = H-GRPO with alpha=1.0 (drops per-turn signal), trivial-decomposer baseline. Canonical-vocabulary copy of configs/method_flat_grpo.json. With alpha=1.0 the choice of decomposer is mathematically inert (only the trajectory advantage survives); progress is used because it is parameter-free. Bit-exact regression target for the HGPO alpha=1 recovery test. Populates methods_comparison.json::flatGRPO.
